content: CC0 dark/grunge pixel platformer packs: 0x72 DungeonTileset II (itch.io, CC0, 16x16, dark dungeon, tiles+animated chars+spike traps, attribution optional) is the strongest dark/grunge fit; Kenney Pixel Platformer is CC0 18x18 but BRIGHT/colorful (poor fit); Kenney 1-Bit Pack CC0 monochrome dark; VEXED Retro Lines CC0 16x16. 0x72 has no coin -> use OpenGameArt CC0 spinning-coin spritesheet. Verify each pack's license page text + screenshot it into assets/LICENSES/ for LEVEL-08.
